plugins.name: Hello World
plugins.description: A simple test plugin that demonstrates the MeshSilo plugin system. Shows route registration, admin pages, CSS assets, and event hooks.
plugins.author: MeshSilo

plugins.name: Single Sign-On
plugins.description: External authentication via OIDC, SAML, LDAP/AD, SCIM provisioning, and OAuth2 provider.
plugins.author: MeshSilo

plugins.name: Analytics & Reports
plugins.description: Usage analytics dashboard, print analytics, scheduled reports, and CLI report generation.
plugins.author: MeshSilo

plugins.name: Backups & Cloud
plugins.description: Database backup and restore with cloud replication support for S3, Dropbox, Google Drive, and OneDrive.
plugins.author: MeshSilo

plugins.name: Retention Policies
plugins.description: Data retention policies, legal holds, automated cleanup, and compliance reporting.
plugins.author: MeshSilo

plugins.name: Demo Mode
plugins.description: Demo accounts, sample NASA 3D models, and periodic reset for demonstration instances.
plugins.author: MeshSilo

plugins.name: Real User Monitoring
plugins.description: Client-side performance analytics with Core Web Vitals tracking and browser metrics.
plugins.author: MeshSilo

plugins.name: Teams
plugins.description: Team collaboration with shared model access, membership management, and invitation system.
plugins.author: MeshSilo

plugins.name: Webhooks
plugins.description: HTTP webhook notifications for application events with retry support, HMAC-SHA256 signatures, and delivery logging.
plugins.author: MeshSilo

plugins.name: 3D Printing Tools
plugins.description: Print queue, printer profiles, slicer integration, GCode parsing, cost calculator, and mesh analysis.
plugins.author: MeshSilo
